tables.name: Country
tables.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
 Code VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT CountryKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Capital VARCHAR(50),
 Province VARCHAR(50),
 Area DECIMAL,
 Population DECIMAL

tables.name: City
tables.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50),
 Country VARCHAR(4),
 Province VARCHAR(50),
 Population DECIMAL,
 Latitude DECIMAL,
 Longitude DECIMAL,
 Elevation DECIMAL,
 CONSTRAINT CityKey PRIMARY KEY (Name, Country, Province)

tables.name: Population
tables.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT PopKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Population_Growth DECIMAL,
 Infant_Mortality DECIMAL

tables.name: Province
tables.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50) CONSTRAINT PrName NOT NULL ,
 Country  VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT PrCountry NOT NULL ,
 Population DECIMAL,
 Area DECIMAL,
 Capital VARCHAR(50),
 CapProv VARCHAR(50),
 CONSTRAINT PrKey PRIMARY KEY (Name, Country)

tables.name: Economy
tables.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT EconomyKey PRIMARY KEY,
 GDP DECIMAL,
 Agriculture DECIMAL,
 Service DECIMAL,
 Industry DECIMAL,
 Inflation DECIMAL,
 Unemployment DECIMAL

tables.name: Politics
tables.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT PoliticsKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Independence DATE,
 WasDependent VARCHAR(50),
 Dependent  VARCHAR(4),
 Government VARCHAR(120)

tables.name: Religion
tables.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4),
 Name VARCHAR(50),
 Percentage DECIMAL,
 CONSTRAINT ReligionKey PRIMARY KEY (Name, Country)

tables.name: EthnicGroup
tables.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4),
 Name VARCHAR(50),
 Percentage DECIMAL,
 CONSTRAINT EthnicKey PRIMARY KEY (Name, Country)

tables.name: Spoken
tables.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4),
 Language VARCHAR(50),
 Percentage DECIMAL,
 CONSTRAINT SpokenKey PRIMARY KEY (Country, Language)

tables.name: Language
tables.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50) ,
 Superlanguage VARCHAR(50),
 CONSTRAINT LanguageKey PRIMARY KEY (Name)

tables.name: Countrypops
tables.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4),
 Year DECIMAL,
 Population DECIMAL,
 CONSTRAINT CountryPopsKey PRIMARY KEY (Country, Year)

tables.name: Countryothername
tables.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4),
 othername VARCHAR(50),
 CONSTRAINT CountryOthernameKey PRIMARY KEY (Country, othername)

tables.name: Countrylocalname
tables.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4),
 localname VARCHAR(300),
 CONSTRAINT CountrylocalnameKey PRIMARY KEY (Country)

tables.name: Provpops
tables.raw_sql_body:
Province VARCHAR(50),
 Country VARCHAR(4),
 Year DECIMAL ,
 Population DECIMAL,
 CONSTRAINT ProvPopKey PRIMARY KEY (Country, Province, Year)

tables.name: Provinceothername
tables.raw_sql_body:
Province VARCHAR(50),
 Country VARCHAR(4),
 othername VARCHAR(50),
 CONSTRAINT ProvOthernameKey PRIMARY KEY (Country, Province, othername)

tables.name: Provincelocalname
tables.raw_sql_body:
Province VARCHAR(50),
 Country VARCHAR(4),
 localname VARCHAR(300),
 CONSTRAINT ProvlocalnameKey PRIMARY KEY (Country, Province)

tables.name: Citypops
tables.raw_sql_body:
City VARCHAR(50),
 Country VARCHAR(4),
 Province VARCHAR(50),
 Year DECIMAL,
 Population DECIMAL,
 CONSTRAINT CityPopKey PRIMARY KEY (Country, Province, City, Year)

tables.name: Cityothername
tables.raw_sql_body:
City VARCHAR(50),
 Country VARCHAR(4),
 Province VARCHAR(50),
 othername VARCHAR(50),
 CONSTRAINT CityOthernameKey PRIMARY KEY (Country, Province, City, othername)

tables.name: Citylocalname
tables.raw_sql_body:
City VARCHAR(50),
 Country VARCHAR(4),
 Province VARCHAR(50),
 localname VARCHAR(300),
 CONSTRAINT CitylocalnameKey PRIMARY KEY (Country, Province, City)

tables.name: Continent
tables.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(20) CONSTRAINT ContinentKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Area DECIMAL(10)

tables.name: borders
tables.raw_sql_body:
Country1 VARCHAR(4),
 Country2 VARCHAR(4),
 Length DECIMAL ,
 CONSTRAINT BorderKey PRIMARY KEY (Country1,Country2)

tables.name: encompasses
tables.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4) NOT NULL,
 Continent VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
 Percentage DECIMAL,
 CONSTRAINT EncompassesKey PRIMARY KEY (Country,Continent)

tables.name: Organization
tables.raw_sql_body:
Abbreviation VARCHAR(12) Constraint OrgKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
 City VARCHAR(50) ,
 Country VARCHAR(4) , 
 Province VARCHAR(50) ,
 Established DATE,
 CONSTRAINT OrgNameUnique UNIQUE (Name)

tables.name: isMember
tables.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4),
 Organization VARCHAR(12),
 Type VARCHAR(60) DEFAULT 'member',
 CONSTRAINT MemberKey PRIMARY KEY (Country,Organization)

tables.name: Mountain
tables.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50) CONSTRAINT MountainKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Mountains VARCHAR(50),
 Elevation DECIMAL,
 Type VARCHAR(10),
 Latitude DECIMAL,
  Longitude DECIMAL

tables.name: Desert
tables.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50) CONSTRAINT DesertKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Area DECIMAL,
 Latitude DECIMAL,
  Longitude DECIMAL

tables.name: Island
tables.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50) CONSTRAINT IslandKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Islands VARCHAR(50),
 Area DECIMAL ,
 Elevation DECIMAL,
 Type VARCHAR(15),
 Latitude DECIMAL,
  Longitude DECIMAL

tables.name: Lake
tables.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50) CONSTRAINT LakeKey PRIMARY KEY,
 River VARCHAR(50),
 Area DECIMAL ,
 Elevation DECIMAL,
 Depth DECIMAL,
 Height DECIMAL,
 Type VARCHAR(12),
 Latitude DECIMAL,
  Longitude DECIMAL

tables.name: Sea
tables.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50) CONSTRAINT SeaKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Area DECIMAL,
 Depth DECIMAL

tables.name: River
tables.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50) CONSTRAINT RiverKey PRIMARY KEY,
 River VARCHAR(50),
 Lake VARCHAR(50),
 Sea VARCHAR(50),
 Length DECIMAL,
 Area DECIMAL,
 SourceLatitude DECIMAL,
 SourceLongitude DECIMAL,
 Mountains VARCHAR(50),
 SourceElevation DECIMAL,
 EstuaryLatitude DECIMAL,
 EstuaryLongitude DECIMAL,
 EstuaryElevation DECIMAL,
 CONSTRAINT RivFlowsInto 
     CHECK ((River IS NULL AND Lake IS NULL)
            OR (River IS NULL AND Sea IS NULL)
            OR (Lake IS NULL AND Sea is NULL))

tables.name: RiverThrough
tables.raw_sql_body:
River VARCHAR(50),
 Lake  VARCHAR(50),
 CONSTRAINT RThroughKey PRIMARY KEY (River,Lake)

tables.name: geo_Mountain
tables.raw_sql_body:
Mountain VARCHAR(50) ,
 Country VARCHAR(4) ,
 Province VARCHAR(50) ,
 CONSTRAINT GMountainKey PRIMARY KEY (Province,Country,Mountain)

tables.name: geo_Desert
tables.raw_sql_body:
Desert VARCHAR(50) ,
 Country VARCHAR(4) ,
 Province VARCHAR(50) ,
 CONSTRAINT GDesertKey PRIMARY KEY (Province, Country, Desert)

tables.name: geo_Island
tables.raw_sql_body:
Island VARCHAR(50) , 
 Country VARCHAR(4) ,
 Province VARCHAR(50) ,
 CONSTRAINT GIslandKey PRIMARY KEY (Province, Country, Island)

tables.name: geo_River
tables.raw_sql_body:
River VARCHAR(50),

 CONSTRAINT GRiverKey PRIMARY KEY (Province ,Country, River)

tables.name: geo_Sea
tables.raw_sql_body:
Sea VARCHAR(50) ,

 Province VARCHAR(50) ,
 CONSTRAINT GSeaKey PRIMARY KEY (Province, Country, Sea)

tables.name: geo_Lake

Lake VARCHAR(50) ,

tables.name: geo_Source
tables.raw_sql_body:
River VARCHAR(50) ,
 Country VARCHAR(4) ,

 CONSTRAINT GSourceKey PRIMARY KEY (Province, Country, River)

tables.name: geo_Estuary
tables.raw_sql_body:
River VARCHAR(50) ,
 Country VARCHAR(4) ,
 Province VARCHAR(50) ,
 CONSTRAINT GEstuaryKey PRIMARY KEY (Province, Country, River)

tables.name: mergesWith
tables.raw_sql_body:
Sea1 VARCHAR(50) ,
 Sea2 VARCHAR(50) ,
 CONSTRAINT MergesWithKey PRIMARY KEY (Sea1, Sea2)

tables.name: located
tables.raw_sql_body:
City VARCHAR(50) ,
 Province VARCHAR(50) ,
 Country VARCHAR(4) ,
 River VARCHAR(50),
 Lake VARCHAR(50),
 Sea VARCHAR(50)

tables.name: locatedOn
tables.raw_sql_body:
City VARCHAR(50) ,
 Province VARCHAR(50) ,
 Country VARCHAR(4) ,
 Island VARCHAR(50) ,
 CONSTRAINT locatedOnKey PRIMARY KEY (City, Province, Country, Island)

tables.name: islandIn
tables.raw_sql_body:
Island VARCHAR(50) ,
 Sea VARCHAR(50) ,
 Lake VARCHAR(50) ,
 River VARCHAR(50)

tables.name: MountainOnIsland
tables.raw_sql_body:
Mountain VARCHAR(50),
 Island   VARCHAR(50),
 CONSTRAINT MountainIslKey PRIMARY KEY (Mountain, Island)

tables.name: LakeOnIsland
tables.raw_sql_body:
Lake    VARCHAR(50),
 Island  VARCHAR(50),
 CONSTRAINT LakeIslKey PRIMARY KEY (Lake, Island)

tables.raw_sql_body:
River   VARCHAR(50),

 CONSTRAINT RiverIslKey PRIMARY KEY (River, Island)
